name: free-ai-forever
description: A free, local AI chat app that runs on your own computer, powered by Ollama.
author: Matthew Bailie

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/sub.mjs backend install && node scripts/sub.mjs frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "node scripts/sub.mjs backend run dev" "node scripts/sub.mjs frontend run dev"
scripts.build: node scripts/sub.mjs backend run build && node scripts/sub.mjs frontend run build
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --dir && npm run rebuild:node
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder && npm run rebuild:node
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --mac && npm run rebuild:node
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --win && npm run rebuild:node
